CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed") || ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled"), TEXT(Account_Customer_Type_Stamp__c), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( Account_Customer_Type_Stamp__c ))), TEXT( Account_Customer_Type_Stamp__c), TEXT( Account__r.Customer_Type__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Account Customer Type
